channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Understanding Tuareg Grievances is Essential for Peace in Mali
item.description: By April 2026, Mali’s already fragile security situation worsened with coordinated attacks on several cities, resulting in the death of the Defence Minister, Sadio Camara, and several soldiers. Resear...

item.title: VD Satheesan Demands CM Post in Kerala or Nothing Amid Congress Internal Tussle
item.description: The Congress party is facing a major internal deadlock in selecting the Chief Minister for the United Democratic Front government in Kerala following their strong victory in the Assembly elections. VD...

item.title: Behind the Scenes: Fred Astaire’s Dedication on the Set of Top Hat (1935)
item.description: Fred Astaire, one of Hollywood’s most meticulous dancers, exemplified perfectionism during the filming of the 1935 musical Top Hat. Known for his rigorous rehearsal routines, Astaire and his dance par...

item.title: HSBC boosts S&P 500 forecast as strong earnings and AI momentum support outlook
item.description: HSBC has increased its year-end target for the S&P 500 index to 7,650, up from a previous estimate of 7,500, reflecting continued confidence in corporate earnings growth. The revised forecast suggests...

item.title: Reflecting on Independence and Community: A Personal Journey Back Home
item.description: Jumol Royes moved from Vaughan, Ontario, to Ottawa in 2023 to pursue a long-deferred bachelor's degree in communications, seeking independence and a fresh start in midlife. As a Black gay man, he hope...

item.title: Examining the Potential Impact of Pauline Hanson Leading Australian Politics
item.description: Recent commentary has sparked debate over the hypothetical scenario of Pauline Hanson, leader of One Nation, becoming the Prime Minister of Australia. Analysts have speculated on the possible formatio...

item.title: Government Strengthens Ward Tribunals to Help Local Disputes

item.title: Senator Dela Rosa Appears at Senate Amid ICC Warrant, Backs Cayetano for Leadership
item.description: On May 11, 2026, Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa returned to the Philippine Senate after months of absence to cast a decisive vote in the leadership contest, supporting Alan Peter Cayetano as Senate P...

item.title: Sindh Sets Summer Holidays for All Schools from June 1 to July 31
item.description: The Sindh Education Department on Monday officially declared that summer vacations for schools in the province will be observed from 1st June to 31st July. This decision is applicable to both public a...

item.title: SAWS Issues Warnings for Severe Cold, Rain, Wind and Snow Across Several Provinces
item.description: The South African Weather Service (SAWS) has issued multiple warnings as a strong cold front is expected to affect parts of the Northern Cape, Western Cape, and Eastern Cape until Tuesday. Residents s...

item.title: Ancient Iron Production Techniques in Senegal Revealed by Archaeological Study
item.description: For over 2000 years, people for present-day Senegal don dey produce iron, and a recent study for Didé West 1, inside Falémé valley for east Senegal, don show us how dem dey do am. Archaeologists from ...

item.title: Unable to generate: original article content not accessible
item.description: Unable to generate: original article content not accessible due to website crawler restrictions. The URL provided only shows a block message preventing automated access to the news story.

item.title: Rivers Education Commissioner Urges Media to Support Educational Programmes

item.title: Tanzania Ranks Second in Africa for Tourism Investment Inflows
item.description: Tanzania has emerged as one of the leading destinations for tourism investments across Africa according to recent reports. The country stands at second position after South Africa in attracting touris...

item.title: Analysis of Macron and Ruto's Priorities at the 2026 Africa-France Summit in Nairobi
item.description: Di 2026 Africa-France summit wey hold for Nairobi na di first one wey no dey in former French colony for Africa, and e dey happen after France relations don collapse with some West African countries l...

item.title: Nick Pasqual convicted of attempted murder and other crimes against ex-girlfriend
item.description: Nick Pasqual, an actor known for appearances in 'How I Met Your Mother' and 'Archive 81,' has been convicted of attempted murder following a brutal attack on his ex-girlfriend, Allie Shehorn, a Hollyw...

item.title: Digital investments in Tanzania surge as DSE and Mixx simplify stock market access
item.description: Dar es Salaam – Tanzania’s stock trading is getting a big shake-up after Mixx by Yas partnered with the Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange (DSE). Digital investments through Mixx app have grown from Sh840 m...

item.title: Sowetan's Midday Entertainment Roundup: Gigi Lamayne's Genre Switch and More
item.description: In this edition of Between Meetings With Sowetan, your daily lunchtime read for 11 May 2026, several engaging stories catch the eye. Award-winning rapper Gigi Lamayne, known for her hard-hitting bars,...

item.title: U.S. and China Initiate Discussions on Emergency AI Communication Channels Amid Breakthrough Concerns
item.description: Amid growing concern over the emergence of highly advanced artificial intelligence, the United States and China have quietly begun discussions to establish an emergency communication channel for AI-re...
